title: stellaria uliginosa var. undulata
intro: Stellaria uliginosa var. undulata, also known as marsh starwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic. Stellaria uliginosa var. undulata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
